title: Understand: photosynthesis in ecosystems
description: Check your understanding of photosynthesis in ecosystems in this set of free practice questions aligned to NGSS standards.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Photosynthetic organisms provide which of the following to other organisms in an ecosystem?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

**Plants provide which of the following to other organisms in an ecosystem?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

**Choose the best phrase to fill in the blank.**

>Plants provide \_\_\_\_\_\_ to other organisms in an ecosystem.

[[☃ radio 1]]

**Choose the best word to fill in the blank.**

>One way that matter moves in an ecosystem is through the process of photosynthesis. For example, photosynthesis causes \_\_\_\_\_\_ to move *from* the environment *into* photosynthetic organisms.

[[☃ radio 1]]

**Choose the best term to fill in the blank.**

>One way that matter moves in an ecosystem is through the process of photosynthesis. For example, photosynthesis causes \_\_\_\_\_\_ to move *from* photosynthetic organisms *into* the environment.

[[☃ radio 1]]

**Choose the best term to fill in the blank.**

>One way that matter moves in an ecosystem is through the process of photosynthesis. For example, photosynthesis causes \_\_\_\_\_\_ to move *from* the environment *into* photosynthetic organisms.

[[☃ radio 2]]

**Which of these describe matter and energy moving from one organism to another?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

**Which of these describe matter and energy moving from one organism to another?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: a grass plant taking in carbon dioxide

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which of these describes matter and energy moving from one organism to another?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

choices.content: a winterberry plant taking in carbon dioxide

assessment_items.question_content:
**Where does the energy in most ecosystems originally come from?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

**Choose the best word or phrase to fill in the blank.**

>The energy in most ecosystems originally comes from \_\_\_\_\_\_.

[[☃ radio 1]]

**Choose the best word or phrase to fill in the blank.**

> \_\_\_\_\_\_ provides the original source of energy in most ecosystems.

[[☃ radio 1]]
